name: system-notification-task-entity-updated
description: System default template for task update notifications (incident comments, assignee changes).
templateSubject: [{{publisherName}}] - New activity on a {{#if entity.category}}{{camelCaseToTitle entity.category}} {{/if}}task
templateBody:
{{#with (groupEventChanges event.changeDescription) as |changes|}}@{{entity.updatedBy}} {{#if (hasFieldInChanges changes 'comments')}}commented on{{else if (hasFieldInChanges changes 'assignees')}}updated the assignees of{{else}}updated{{/if}} the {{#if entity.category}}{{camelCaseToTitle entity.category}} {{/if}}task{{#if entity.about}} for {{camelCaseToTitle entity.about.type}} {{#if entity.about.displayName}}{{entity.about.displayName}}{{else}}{{entity.about.fullyQualifiedName}}{{/if}}{{/if}}.{{#if (hasFieldInChanges changes 'comments')}}{{#each entity.comments}}{{#if @last}}

💬 Reply:
{{{processMentions message}}}
{{/if}}{{/each}}{{/if}}{{#if entity.assignees}}

Assignees: {{#each entity.assignees}}@{{#if displayName}}{{displayName}}{{else}}{{name}}{{/if}}{{#unless @last}}, {{/unless}}{{/each}}{{/if}}{{/with}}
